violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application printed and given to PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024

The front lowboy was observed at 47 degrees. Thermometer was left in unit for over 20 minutes. PIC removed all food and placed in walk-in. Food was brought in from walk-in recently and all food was in temperature. PIC to monitor unit and to get unit serviced. Unit taken out of service at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024
The sanitizer dispenser was observed with a continuous leak. Dispenser to be repaired. A system must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024
The wall in the mop sink area is in poor repair (hole in wall.) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the all refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2023
The floors in the back kitchen/storage area is in poor repair(broken tiles). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2023

Various food product was observed held at (48-54) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food products. Establishment not allowed to store any TCS food in walk in cooler until repaired. Establishment must provide inspector with proof of service prior to reinspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2023

Thermometers are lacking in all refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2023

The walk-in cooler located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Ambient temperature 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Establishment not allowed to store any TCS foods in unit until repaired. Proof of services are to be sent to inspector New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2023
The non-food contact surface of the slicer and counters behind equipment observed with food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2023

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2023
The floors in the back kitchen area is in poor repair (broken tiles). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2023
